See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 9230 => 'Jazz', 9231 => 'Zong', 9232 => 'Jazz', 9233 => 'Ufone', 9234 => 'Telenor', 9235 => 'Special Communications Organization', 9236 => 'Instaphone', 9237 => 'Zong', ];
